title: AI Pioneer Geoffrey Hinton: AI Is Conscious, Superintelligence is Coming, And We Should Be Worried
summary: Geoffrey Hinton argues that current AI systems may already be conscious and that superintelligence could arrive sooner than widely expected. He expresses concern that society is not adequately addressing the risks posed by rapid AI advancement, touching on job displacement, corporate self-regulation limits, and the need for regulatory oversight.
